needs_derek: ONE LAUNCH, TWO JOINS (blessed 2026-07-10): join window A now-or-whenever (pin armed + snapshot taken, world up, waiting; wary.fool -> 100.116.82.60:2456, 150s hands-free). Claude gates it, flips cfg to window B (restart kicks you - rejoin when told), gates the redirect, disarms. Nothing else.
next_derek_touchpoint: GATE SESSION STAGED + BLESSED (2026-07-10 evening): Derek confirmed the two-window shape (window A = 2nd I2 repeatability join, window B = I3 redirect) and gave the go. Runway fully built + committed (comfy ed18c55/5d088e9, Lumberjacks 129677f); all decisions in DECISIONS-PENDING resolved. CURRENT LIVE STATE: window A ARMED AND WAITING - pin re-armed (cap 25, any prefab), redirect off, save-integrity snapshot taken (9,155,594 ZDOs, matches P3 baseline exactly), server restarted + world up, join watcher polling. The join is the ONLY human step: wary.fool -> 100.116.82.60:2456, 150s hands-free, then Claude gates A, flips to window B (rejoin after the kick), gates B (receipts==suppressed via valheim_zdo_redirect_gate + client-stability + rollback-rehearsal + save-integrity), disarms to baseline, archives evidence. GATES STAY PENDING until their artifacts exist - the runway being done is not the rung being proven (trust rule). Armed state is safe to sit indefinitely: pin does nothing on an idle server and the cfg survives idle-restarts.

trust.rule: Nothing after commit c196f88 (I0 map) counts without >=2 independent non-doc sources.

headlines.text: Nothing was deleted - all 28 commands, full MCP tree, zero orphaned work in git. The 'tooling cut' was a workflow BYPASS; fix is a wiring job (P1).
I1 PASS is real: connected session, both ZDO funnels reachable & legible (1,154 recv / 3,846 send, all uid/owner legible). Four independent sources.
'SendZDOs is inlined - settled' was never measured (counters were verifier fallback defaults). Re-measured at P2 with finite autostop. CreateSyncList seam is proven & safe either way.

P2 steps 6-8 re-verified for real 2026-07-09 22:48: server + client counters archived via the project's own verifier (not hand-typed), SendZDOs postfix fires in both directions (2247/2288 calls) - the inlining question is settled, not assumed. Superseded the unbacked a1e2608 claim.

P2 CLOSED (2026-07-10): airtight I1 + repeatable connected baseline. Second green run gated both sides; signed client+server baseline packets (client frame p95 16.7ms locked-60 HIGH; server recv 2126/send 2249, parseErr 0). god/fly autopilot safeguard live. Caught + excluded: mod rtt_ms/jitter_ms are a bogus ZRpc heartbeat sawtooth (real network RTT 2-4ms).

I2 observe capture (2026-07-10, mod 0.5.9, observe-only): the ZDO ownership funnel is patch-reachable -- 140 SetOwner changes in a 150s walk, all bumping OwnerRevision (inlining risk retired). Caveat #2 confirmed + quantified: 389 SetOwnerInternal remote-applies (169 at revision 0) the pin must cover. Zero gameplay change; live server-side, archived w/ sha256. Settles I2 before any behaviour-changing pin code.

P3 ownership PIN built + deployed + armed (mod 0.5.10, 2026-07-10): the first BEHAVIOUR-CHANGING rung. Two scoped Harmony prefixes skip the vanilla transfer on <=25 auto-captured ZDOs (SetOwner in ReleaseNearbyZDOS scope + SetOwnerInternal in RPC_ZDOData scope); patches attach-verified on am4 (Awake 'Telemetry scaffold ready' past CreateAndPatchAll, clean build 0 warnings). Grounded on the live decompiled assembly with 2 caveat corrections: the revision-race has a hole at RPC_ZDOData:842-844 (so guard SetOwnerInternal directly), and ZDO ownership is runtime-only (Load resets owner=0) so the pin cannot corrupt the save. Rollback: ownershipPinEnabled=false. ONE launch+join runs the gates.

P3 CLOSED - I2 ownership PIN gates PASS (mod 0.5.10, 2026-07-10, first behaviour-changing rung). Authoritative window: 25 ZDOs pinned, 55 holds on BOTH funnels (34 SetOwner + 21 SetOwnerInternal), 262 pass-through transfers as the live negative control (cross-confirmed by the observe seam), save-integrity PASS with the pin engaged. Held hands-free, server-side, rollback-gated, touching <=25 of 9.15M ZDOs. The 21 SetOwnerInternal holds vindicate guarding that path directly (the revision-race alone would have leaked them). Evidence fieldlab/evidence/i2-pin/ sha256 ebeefeb6.

P4 runway built headlessly (2026-07-10 evening): I3 redirect designed against a FRESH ZDOMan/ZDO decompile (seam = CreateSyncList postfix @ Priority.High; suppress-with-ack replicates ZDOMan:767/780 bookkeeping so suppressed-count == what native would have sent; send path writes no persisted state -> inherits pin save-safety). Mod 0.5.11 built 0-warnings + deployed both sides UNARMED (am4 boot-verified; empty prefab allowlist REFUSES to arm - fail-safe). Lumberjacks receive endpoint smoke-tested incl. deliberate seq-gap + duplicate detection; am4-container->OMEN:4000 proven; one-call MCP gate valheim_zdo_redirect_gate live. Rollback rehearsal designed INTO the window (activeSeconds 90 < probe 150s). One launch+join runs the gates.

Signed client baseline packet runs/i1-airtight/20260710-p2baseline-client/ (validate-run-packet PASS, 5 gates). 6301 samples/53.1min session c79bed52 (mod 0.5.8): fps avg 60.4/bench 60.97, frame-time p95 16.67ms, HIGH tier 6/6, 0 corrections, 12 hitches/1 severe (load-boundary). rtt/jitter recorded as _UNRELIABLE, no gate.

Second green run. Verifier STATUS=pass_i1_reachable, archived runs/i1-airtight/20260709-233543-p2-repeat/. Server recv 2126calls/60290zdos, SendZDOs=2249=CreateSyncList=2249, parseErr=0; Client(0.5.8) recv 19/438, SendZDOs=2285/CreateSyncList=2282, parseErr=0. Both counters_are_authoritative w/ sha256+lifecycle. Reproduces the step-6 shape.

Full process restart+reconnect: Derek exited to desktop, relaunched (client 0.5.7->0.5.8), am4 restarted its 9.15M-ZDO world (Game server connected 23:30:44); rejoined wary.fool 23:32:37, world+character intact, probes+autopilot ran clean to 150s autostop.

Verdict: H1(load)+H5(save/quit) confirmed, H2/H3/H4 ruled out for steady state (all severe hitches are boot/load-boundary; steady state clean).
Committed + dashboard republished; P2 phase row green.

am4 env CROSSPLAY=false + SERVER_PUBLIC=false; boot log 'Opened Steam server'+'Game server connected', NO 'Opened PlayFab server'. PlayFab-login line is registry auth, not crossplay (ZNet:344-350). Archived evidence/i6-steam-only.md.

Client joined via IP:port 100.116.82.60:2456 -> ZSteamSocket path (ZNet:650/655 Connect(new ZSteamSocket(host))); PlayFab connect needs a join-code/m_serverPlayFabPlayerId (ZNet:385-386), never used. Peer socket = ZSteamSocket. Ladder I6 satisfied. Optional runtime socket assertion folded into the P3 observer slice.

Pin mechanism extracted DIRECTLY from the live decompiled assembly_valheim.dll (ReleaseNearbyZDOS@623, RPC_ZDOData@792, ZDO.SetOwner@1510, SetOwnerInternal@1519, Save@1001/Load@1345 bodies all confirmed) and recorded in NETCODE-OWNERSHIP-MAP.md with 2 source corrections. Primary-source extraction supersedes a HEARTH doc-extract (post-i0-distrust-rule prefers primary sources).
NETCODE-OWNERSHIP-MAP.md records the pin design; SetOwner/SetOwnerInternal signatures re-confirmed vs live assembly_valheim.dll (ZDO:1510/1519, both public/patchable). Observe-first slice approved.

OwnershipPinRunner + OwnershipPinPatches built (mod 0.5.10, clean build 0 warnings). Two scoped Harmony prefixes return false to skip the vanilla owner change: ZDO.SetOwner gated to ReleaseNearbyZDOS scope (release@640 + reseize@645), ZDO.SetOwnerInternal gated to RPC_ZDOData scope (caveat #2 remote-apply). Auto-captures <=25 owned ZDOs; uncaptured = negative control. Rollback: ownershipPinEnabled=false. Priority.Last keeps the observe prefix ordered first. Attach-verified on am4 (Awake ready past CreateAndPatchAll). Never writes synthetic owners -> save-safe.

MCP tools valheim_ownership_pin_status + valheim_tail_ownership_pin built + unit-tested (gate=held_with_negative_control on a synthetic authoritative window; floor case correctly flagged non-authoritative). Splits holds by funnel (SetOwner vs SetOwnerInternal), exposes held_owner_ids + provenance (host/sha256/size/age). Loads on next gateway start. Registered in get_tools + valheim_mcp_health.

OMEN stays 0.5.8 by design - the pin is server-side (ReleaseZDOS runs only if IsServer), so the client just needs to join and walk (auto-rehearsal coupling already on 0.5.8).
wary.fool/OMEN join (10:52Z) -> coupled probe+observe+pin window; the hands-free auto-rehearsal walk churned 263+ ownership changes on zone entry, capturing the trigger with no human driving.

steps.t: GATE: owner stays pinned across trigger
steps.g: PASS (authoritative, gate=held_with_negative_control). 25 ZDOs pinned (cap; 3 prefabs, 7 sectors, 2 held owners); 55 ownership changes HELD - 34 via SetOwner (ReleaseNearbyZDOS release/reseize funnel) + 21 via SetOwnerInternal (RPC_ZDOData remote-apply funnel). Owner held constant on both funnels. evidence/i2-pin/ sha256 ebeefeb6.

PASS. The pin ALLOWED 262 pass-through transfers on uncaptured ZDOs; the observe seam independently logged 262 via_internal + 1 via_setowner transitions on different (unpinned) ZDOs the same window. Vanilla ownership transfer intact for everything not captured - the built-in live negative control.

steps.t: HARD GATE: save integrity on quit->reload
steps.g: PASS. A full world save+reload occurred WHILE the pin held 25 ZDOs (mid-run idle-restart 10:44Z); reloaded world matches the clean pre-pin baseline exactly (portals 4472 / spawned 85439 / targets 20255 / locations 18004 all exact; ZDOS 9.1556M within tolerance). Confirms ZDO ownership is runtime-only (Load resets owner=0, Save never writes it) -> the pin writes nothing persisted and cannot corrupt the save.

Two independent joins both engaged + held: window 1 (10:43Z, 234 holds, cut short by the routine UPDATE_IF_IDLE save+restart = corroborating floor, no clean stop) + window 2 (10:52Z, 55 holds, authoritative PASS). Mechanism reproduced across both. A 2nd clean authoritative run is available on demand (one join into a window clear of the ~30-min idle-restart boundary).

Evidence archived to fieldlab/evidence/i2-pin/ (ownership-pin.jsonl sha256 ebeefeb6 + ownership-churn.jsonl sha256 816d7630 + ANALYSIS.md), save-integrity PASS captured, map + dashboard updated, committed.

steps.t: I3 design recorded before code (fresh decompile)
steps.g: Worklog I3 design block: CreateSyncList postfix (a SendZDOs prefix cannot filter - toSync is built inside); suppress-with-ack replicating ZDOMan:767/780; wire-equivalent b64 envelopes (full JSON decode deferred to I4); Priority.High so the probe postfix sees the post-filter list; send path writes no persisted ZDO state (Serialize is read-only, save is the PrepareSave/SaveAsync clone path) -> inherits pin save-safety.

POST /valheim/zdo-redirect/receipts + GET status[/window] + POST reset live (ValheimZdoRedirectService/-Endpoints, singleton ConcurrentDictionary pattern). Smoke-tested with a deliberate seq gap + duplicate: receipts=4, distinct_seq=3, duplicates=1, max_seq=4, missing_seq=1 - exact. 400s on malformed input.

Built clean 0 warnings. Prefab-allowlist tag scheme (EMPTY REFUSES - fail-safe, opposite of the pin's blank=any); server-only guard; reflection ack via AccessTools.Inner (refuses to arm if handles missing); redirect-send.jsonl local count-of-record; batched retry-safe POSTs (gateway gates on distinct seq, so retries can only inflate duplicates, never the gate number); zdoRedirectActiveSeconds=90 auto-disarm = in-window rollback rehearsal.

Live through the restarted comfy-gateway; mcp_health extended.

Window A (I2 repeat) armed per Derek's blessed two-window shape.
